title: RNA Extraction with PGTX
author: Lutz LCB Berwanger
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ywwfxfe
materials: Let the samples incubate for 10 min at room temperature in a Thermomixer. Vortex from time to time. 00:10:00

steps.title: Centrifuge for 3 minutes at 4˚C and 4
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 3 minutes at 4˚C and 4.000 g. 00:03:00

steps.title: Resuspend the cell pellet in 1 ml of PGTX
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cell pellet in 1 ml of PGTX. Freeze in liquid nitrogen and store at -20 ˚C. Wear goggles, a lab coat and gloves when dealing with PGTX and liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Incubate for 5 min at 95...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 min at 95 °C, shaking at 250 rpm in Thermomixer (Eppendorf) 00:05:00

steps.title: Add 700 µl Chloroform
steps.instruction: Add 700 µl Chloroform. Wear goggles, a lab coat and gloves when dealing with phenol and chloroform. Chloroform Contributed by users

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 min at 14
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 min at 14.000 g, 4 ˚C. Transfer the upper aqueous phase ( contains RNA ) to a fresh reaction tube and add the same volume (450 µL) of Aqua- P/C/I (Phenol/Chloroform/Isoamylalcohol). 00:15:00 Wear goggles, a lab coat and gloves when dealing with phenol and chloroform.

steps.title: Thoroughly mix by vortexing
steps.instruction: Thoroughly mix by vortexing. Centrifuge for 15 min at high speed. Transfer the upper aqueous phase to a 1.5 mL reaction tube. 00:15:00 Wear goggles, a lab coat and gloves when dealing with phenol and chloroform.

steps.title: Add 1 volume of isopropanol
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume of isopropanol. Isopropanol Contributed by users

steps.title: Mix and incubate for at least...
steps.instruction: Mix and incubate for at least 30 min at -20 ˚C. (Can be left overnight.) 00:30:00

steps.title: Wash with 75% chilled ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash with 75% chilled ethanol. Avoid resuspending the pellet. Ethyl alcohol, Pure 200 proof, for molecular biology Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #E7023

steps.title: Repeat washing step with 75% chilled ethanol
steps.instruction: Repeat washing step with 75% chilled ethanol. Remove excess of EtOH by using a pipet.

steps.title: Air dry pellet at RT
steps.instruction: Air dry pellet at RT. Do not overdry! 00:10:00

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet with 30 µL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet with 30 µL volume of ddH 2 O. Usually 40 µL DECP-treated H 2 O

steps.title: Fill 50 mL Falcon tube with ice
steps.instruction: Fill 50 mL Falcon tube with ice. Fill with bacterial liquid culture, up to a volume of ~45 mL.

steps.title: Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant. Resuspend cell pellet in residual water (~1 mL). Transfer to 2 mL 'safe lock' tube.
